audit_intro: A private record of privacy actions on your account. Only you can see this.
auth_check_email_body: We've sent you a confirmation link. Click it to finish creating your account, then come back to sign in.
auth_signin_subtitle: Sign in with your email and password.
auth_signout_confirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?
auth_signup_subtitle: One account per person. Pair up after sign-up.
daily_answer_label: Your answer (private until you both answer)
daily_unlock_hint: Their reply unlocks once they've sent theirs.
heartbeat_zone_aria: Send heartbeat to partner — double tap
ios_install_inapp_hint: Tip: tap the ··· menu, then Open in Safari.
ios_install_inapp_hint_html: Tip: tap the ··· menu, then Open in Safari.
ios_install_intro: Add DuoSync to your Home Screen for instant launch, full-screen view, and push notifications when your partner pings you.
ios_install_non_safari: This browser can't add apps to the iPhone Home Screen — only Safari can. Open this page in Safari to install.
ios_install_step1_inline_html: Tap the Share button in Safari's bottom bar.
ios_install_step1_open_share: Tap the Share button at the bottom of Safari.
ios_install_step2_add_home: Scroll and choose Add to Home Screen.
ios_install_step2_inline_html: Scroll and choose Add to Home Screen.
ios_install_step3_confirm: Tap Add. DuoSync will appear on your home screen.
link_subtitle: Share your code with them, or enter theirs.
memory_first_ping_caption: Since {date}, we've been in sync. Still here.
moment_card_locked_hint: Walk to the spot to read 🚶
moment_card_locked_lorem: A note only readable when you walk close enough.
moments_empty: No moments yet. Walk to a place and tap to leave one for them.
moments_empty_long: No moments yet. Walk to a place and tap {plus} to leave one for them.
moments_new_caption_placeholder: Leave something for them to find when they walk by…
moments_new_err_no_geo: This browser has no location access.
offline_body: We'll keep your last known state in view until the connection comes back.
offline_queue_dead_empty: Nothing here — all writes have either succeeded or are still retrying.
offline_queue_lead: Writes saved while offline (location pings, new moments). Drained automatically when the connection comes back.
onboarding_link_share: Share this code with your partner
onboarding_perms_geo_body: Your live pulse on the map only updates when this is on.
onboarding_perms_intro: Both are optional. You can change them later in Settings.
onboarding_perms_push_body: Get a gentle ping when your partner drops a moment near you.
onboarding_perms_push_unsupported: Notifications are not available on this device. iOS users: install to home screen first.
onboarding_subtitle: Just the basics. You can change them later.
pulse_perm_denied: Location permission denied. Enable it in your browser to share distance.
settings_delete_warning: Schedules permanent deletion in 7 days. Sign in any time before then to cancel. Your partner will be unpaired immediately.
settings_ghost_hint: Hide your location. They see only "hidden", no distance.
settings_unpair_warning: Disconnects. Shared history kept until cleared. You'll go back to the pairing-code screen.
welcome_feature_chat: 💬 Whisper Chat — lightweight, with read receipts.
welcome_feature_moments: 📍 Geo-Moments — leave notes that unlock when they're near.
welcome_feature_proximity: 🔔 Proximity Alerts — quietly notified when they arrive.
welcome_feature_pulse: 🫧 The Shared Pulse — distance, mood, battery at a glance.
welcome_get_started_hint: Sign in with email to pair up.
welcome_offline_hint: You're offline — reconnect to sign in.
welcome_tag: A private, real-time digital sanctuary for two.
